prompt: Ukiyo-e woodblock print style, Hokusai inspired. A lone traveler in traditional Japanese robes descends a steep mountain path step by step, each footstep carved into the slope, always moving downward toward a glowing valley below. Bold black outlines, flat unmodulated color fills in indigo, ochre and rust. Dramatic diagonal composition, visible woodgrain texture, stark figure-ground contrast. No text, no labels, no modern elements.
tradition_approach: Targeted Hokusai compositional diagonals, flat unmodulated color fills, bold black outlines, visible woodgrain texture, and stark figure-ground contrast using indigo, ochre, and rust palette.
